title: Source title
author: Author or publisher
input_summary: One paragraph summary of what the source says.
market_signal: What market narrative or evidence this source adds.
extracted_claims: Claim that can be tested or falsified.

investment_translation.rationale: Why this source changes or does not change the thesis.

red_flags: What could be hype, missing evidence, or a mistaken inference?
next_actions: Primary-source check or model update required next.
